chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rulings Regarding Male Slaves and Female Bondwoman

text: 4567 - وَ قَالَ: فِي جَارِيَةٍ لِرَجُلٍ وَ كَانَ يَأْتِيهَا فَأَسْقَطَتْ سِقْطاً مِنْهُ بَعْدَ ثَلاَثَةِ أَشْهُرٍ قَالَ "هِيَ أُمُّ وَلَدٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4567 - Imam (as) said regarding a bondwoman who belonged to a man and with whom he had relations, and she miscarried his child after three months:
"She is considered Umm Walad (the mother of his child)."
